data.body: AC amendment: Add to huge-diff-pattern-extraction.md contract: (a) Consensus equivalence: transformation_description strings are compared after lowercasing and stripping leading/trailing whitespace. (b) Failure taxonomy for Step 2 in REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md: 'failure' = any of: agent timeout, non-zero exit, response is not valid JSON, missing required field (transformation_description), or confidence='low' (low-confidence responses do not count toward ≥5/7 consensus). (c) Add these definitions to the contract so the parser (workflow) and emitter (haiku agent prompt) use identical semantics.
